ServiceEngine.description: Disables telemetry, Xbox, diagnostic, and other unnecessary services

TaskEngine.description: Disables 40+ telemetry, CEIP, feedback, and bloat scheduled tasks

AppxEngine.description: Removes unnecessary AppX packages and bloatware

RegistryEngine.description: Applies 50+ registry tweaks for privacy, performance, and UI

PolicyEngine.description: Applies 30+ group policy rules for telemetry, privacy, and app permissions

PerformanceEngine.description: Applies system-wide performance optimizations: HAGS, CPU priority, power throttling, gaming profile

UIEngine.description: Disables transparency, animations, and visual effects for snappier feel

WallpaperEngine.description: Applies ArcOS custom wallpaper and accent color

EdgeEngine.description: Disables Edge startup boost and background mode

NetworkEngine.description: Disables Nagle, QoS throttling, LSO; tunes TCP stack and DNS cache for lower latency

GamingEngine.description: Enables Game Mode, HAGS, GPU priority scheduling; disables Game Bar, fullscreen optimizations, power throttling
